biography:
Started martial arts in Jiu-Jitsu under John Therien, then switched to kickboxing under Canadian kickboxing legend Jean-Yves Theriault and currently trains in Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu under Carlos Machado.

Worked as a Stunt Double on movies such as X-Men: Days of Future Past (2014) , X-Men: Apocalypse (2016) , Warcraft: The Beginning (2016) and Suicide Squad (2016).
name: Alain Moussi
